At Access Barristers, we handle complex divorce cases with a clear strategy, fixed fees, and a relentless focus on your outcome.

Start Your Free Breakdown →

settings.title: The difference is in our approach

settings.editor: 01
No hourly billing. No ambiguity. You'll know the exact cost before we start — and that never changes.
02
Bespoke legal strategy built around your goals — protecting your children, home, business & future.
03
From million-pound settlements to child access appeals — handled with a 97% success rate.
04
Always a phone call away to walk you through every stage of your case from start to finish.
05
Work directly with your specialist barrister — no solicitor middleman, no information lost.
06
Your first strategy session is completely free — usually worth £899. Map out your path to the ideal outcome.

settings.title:
Your first session,
step by step

settings.editor: In your free 30-minute breakdown, we map out your full situation and hand you a custom strategy — with fixed fees and no obligation.
Get Your Free Breakdown →
1
We start by understanding your full situation — relationship history, children, assets, and prior legal steps.
2
We're goal-focused. We need to know exactly what winning looks like for you — custody, assets, timeline.
3
Any prior proceedings or agreements? We assess everything to identify the best path forward for your case.
4
Walk away with a clear, personalised plan — built specifically for your case, with a fixed fee and next steps.
Financial Settlement
Successfully persuaded the court to ring-fence over £1M as pre-matrimonial assets, limiting the remainder to meet parties' needs.
✅ Successful outcome
Child Access
Complex same-sex couple case involving a sperm donor father. Successfully secured maintenance and a fair outcome for our client.
✅ Successful outcome
False Allegations
Serious physical & sexual assault allegations made against a father — no findings made, and a shared care order granted.
✅ Successful outcome
